source.name: User curated premium video hero skill set
source.license_notes: User-curated prompt rules distilled into reusable local database guidance. Do not copy external media assets directly.

visual_traits: multiple hero composition models instead of one centered template
full-screen video with readable content layers
layout_rules: Choose a clear hero composition model before coding.
Do not default every hero to centered text.
Top-aligned cinematic hero uses min-h-screen, large top padding, giant uppercase type, tight line-height, and campaign CTA.
Bottom-left cinematic hero uses full-screen video, content bottom-left, controlled max-width, and directional gradients.
Centered SaaS/app video hero uses centered headline, tagline pill, dual CTA, and transparent overlay navigation.
Two-panel Liquid Glass split hero uses left narrative around 52% and right information cluster around 48%, with right panel hidden on mobile.
Technical education HLS hero uses HLS video, vertical grid, SVG glow, floating glass info card, and uppercase technical headline.
Strict grayscale hero uses no colored accents and relies on opacity hierarchy, material, typography, and spacing.
interaction_states: MP4 video uses autoPlay, loop, muted, playsInline, object-cover, absolute inset-0, and z-0.
Content sits above video at z-10 or z-20; navbar sits above at z-20 to z-50.
CTA hover uses restrained scale-105; active uses scale-95.
Mobile hamburger opens a functional full-screen dark overlay menu.
Video readability must be checked before omitting overlays.
Reduced-motion mode should use static poster or reduced video emphasis.
accessibility_notes: Do not place white text directly over bright video areas without gradient support.
Do not rely on video content as the only value proposition.
Use muted autoplay video only; never autoplay audio.
Mobile menus must be keyboard reachable and dismissible.
Check CTA contrast against video and overlays.
Avoid rapid motion behind long reading content.
implementation_hints: Recommended hero models: top-aligned cinematic, bottom-left cinematic, full-screen MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, strict grayscale Liquid Glass, two-panel Liquid Glass split, and technical education HLS.
Top-aligned campaign typography can use Rubik or strong geometric sans, uppercase, bold, text-6xl mobile, text-8xl tablet, around 100px desktop, line-height 0.98, letter-spacing -2px to -4px.
Bottom-left hero z-index: video z-0, overlay z-5, content z-10 or z-20, navbar z-50.
MP4 background video requires autoPlay, loop, muted, playsInline, absolute inset-0, w-full, h-full, object-cover, z-0.
Directional overlays are better than a single generic black overlay: left text uses left-to-right gradient, bottom text uses bottom-up gradient, centered text uses radial or central contrast layer.
avoid_when: complex console or dense form workflow
full-line gradient headlines when single accent punctuation is enough

quality.notes: Directly distilled from the user-curated premium video hero layout prompt.

retrieval.ai_summary: Premium video hero layout system for landing page, SaaS homepage, portfolio first screen, app launch, and cinematic product websites. Choose a composition model before coding: top-aligned campaign, bottom-left poster, MP4 dark video, centered SaaS/app video, two-panel Liquid Glass, technical education HLS, or strict grayscale glass. Includes video layer, typography, CTA, nav, mobile menu, overlays, and information clusters.
